data.title: Avosina Healthcare Solutions in Lorton, VA, alerts individuals about a data breach affecting personal info, starting Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: In Lorton, Virginia, on January 9, 2026, Avosina Healthcare Solutions ("Avosina") announced a privacy breach affecting certain individuals. The company has started sending out written notifications to potentially impacted individuals regarding the incident. The breach involves the compromise of personal information of a specific number of individuals, and the notifications aim to alert and inform those affected.

data.title: Illuminate Rx, a PBM affiliate of RxBenefits, appoints Ritu Malhotra, PharmD, as President. She brings over 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on January 9, 2026, Illuminate Rx, a pharmacy benefits manager (PBM) associated with RxBenefits, Inc., revealed the selection of Ritu Malhotra, PharmD, as their President. Malhotra brings over 20 years of expertise in revolutionizing healthcare and pharmacy services.

data.title: ESCA praises Trump Admin for 15% global tax exemption for US companies, with agreement from 145+ countries.
data.description: Earlier this week, a "side-by-side" agreement was disclosed by the OECD involving over 145 countries. This agreement exempts all U.S. companies from the recent 15% tax on global income for multinational corporations. The cooperation among the countries is aimed at fiscal harmony and fair taxation practices.

data.title: Ripple authorized by FCA to expand crypto payments in the UK, achieving regulatory approval for its business.
data.description: Ripple has received approval from the UK's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) to expand its payments business operations. This regulatory approval will allow Ripple to accelerate its growth and operations in the UK market. The approval signifies a significant milestone for Ripple as it continues to establish itself as a key player in the fintech industry. This development highlights Ripple's commitment to compliance and regulatory standards, paving the way for increased adoption of its payment solutions. The approval from the FCA is expected to have a positive impact on Ripple's business, enabling it to provide its services to a larger customer base in the UK.

data.title: Afari and Geely launch G-ASD, an intelligent driving system at CES, promising integrated solutions.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, Afari and Geely revealed at the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show the worldwide introduction of G-ASD (Geely Afari Smart Driving), an innovative intelligent driving system. G-ASD is a comprehensive and cutting-edge solution designed to enhance driving experiences and safety, combining the expertise of both companies.

data.title: Lumos sees leadership changes for continued growth, CEO Brian Stading to retire. David Smith promoted to COO after 13 years.
data.description: In High Point, North Carolina, Lumos has revealed leadership advancements to bolster the growth of its fiber broadband presence. CEO Brian Stading will retire by the end of the first quarter after a strategic transition. David Smith, with 13 years at Lumos, is now the Chief Operating Officer (COO), providing essential operational expertise. These changes aim to support the company's expansion and scale-up, reflecting a strategic focus on enhancing their infrastructure.

data.description: A state-of-the-art facility in HEBRON, Ky., unveiled on Jan. 9, 2026, by Pomeroy Technologies, LLC ("Pomeroy"), a top player in technology solutions. The facility showcases a diverse range of workplace and retail innovations aimed at demonstrating practical benefits and value.

data.title: Decrease in used jet inventory due to seasonal sales, maintained values. Dec data on Sandhills show trends.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, on January 9, 2026, the latest aviation market reports from Sandhills Global showcase December figures for various aircraft categories. The data includes insights on used jet aircraft, piston-single aircraft, turboprop aircraft, and Robinson piston helicopters available on Controller.com and other Sandhills platforms. This information offers valuable insights into the current market trends and is crucial for potential buyers, with updates on pricing, availability, and demand for these aircraft types.

data.title: Kimberly Russo to chair ENA Foundation's 2026 Board of Trustees, funding research and scholarships for emergency nurses.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, on January 9, 2026, it was reported that Kimberly Russo, MSN, RN, CEN, TCRN, an experienced emergency department nurse, would be leading the 2026 Board of Trustees for the ENA Foundation. This foundation specializes in funding research and providing scholarships for emergency nurses. Kimberly Russo's leadership comes at a crucial time as the foundation aims to support more individuals in the field. With her expertise, the board looks forward to expanding their reach and impact.
